steps.title: Identify the sentence structure
steps.content: The sentence begins with “By supplying,” an introductory prepositional phrase that sets up context before the main clause “the Neo-Assyrian Empire grew” begins.

steps.title: Apply the introductory phrase rule
steps.content:
A comma separates an introductory phrase from the main independent clause.

Choice D provides “items, the” — the comma correctly marks this boundary between the introductory phrase and the main clause.

The other three choices fail to apply this punctuation rule.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
